data.body:
## Description

**What**: Add a mandatory hypothesis_tests section to the Investigation RESULT Report Schema and update all investigation prompt templates to require it.
**Why**: Investigation agents currently have an optional tests_run field that they can skip. A mandatory structured section with hypothesis/test/observed/verdict fields forces agents to empirically validate before proposing fixes.
**Scope**:
- IN: Update RESULT schema in SKILL.md, update basic, intermediate, intermediate-fallback, advanced-a, advanced-b, cluster investigation prompts
- OUT: Escalated agent prompts (agents 1-3 not yet created — blocked by separate epic), orchestrator validation logic (story 91bf-a66b)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the Investigation RESULT Report Schema in SKILL.md contains a hypothesis_tests section with four required fields per entry: hypothesis, test, observed, verdict
  ← Satisfies: "All investigation prompts require a structured hypothesis_tests section in the RESULT schema"
- When this story is complete, all existing investigation prompt templates reference the hypothesis_tests section and instruct the agent to populate it before reporting a root cause
  ← Satisfies: "each entry has four fields: hypothesis, test, observed, verdict"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] 7+ prompt files must be updated consistently — use the same hypothesis_tests template text across all prompts
